description: A nurse dictates patient intake data via voice. The system maps transcript spans to FHIR-aligned schema fields, adds a new field (chiefComplaint) not in the base schema, and surfaces an ambiguous age value as a voice-sourced design probe.
steps: Create portfolio with title 'Nurse-Patient Voice Intake'
Generate base schema from FHIR patient intent (6 fields)
Click voice-record-btn; fixture replays pre-recorded transcript
mapTranscriptToSchemaAction maps known fields and adds chiefComplaint
Ambiguous age surfaces as a voice design probe
Resolve voice probe → age confirmed as 45
